pending.reason: Digitale-Gesundheitsanwendungen-Verordnung. Legal regulation governing DiGA approval requirements (interoperability, data protection, evidence of benefit). Now referenced in DiGA article. Important for understanding the regulatory framework.
Medizinische Informationsobjekte. Standardized FHIR profiles for specific clinical documents (vaccination records, Mutterpass, etc.) used in the ePA. Referenced in KBV and DiGA articles.
